chunks.title: The Queen of Sheba Visits Solomon
chunks.reason: A complete narrative account of the Queen's journey, her testing of Solomon, and her departure.

chunks.title: Solomon's Wealth and Power
chunks.reason: A detailed description of Solomon's annual income, military strength, trade networks, and opulent possessions.

chunks.title: Solomon's Reign and Death
chunks.reason: A concluding summary referencing historical sources and recording the end of Solomon's reign.
